goal: User asks if /World/Cube has 'obstacle' semantic class; it has no SemanticsAPI. Another prim /World/Marker does have that label (distractor).
thoughts: Distractor pattern: the class exists in the stage but on a DIFFERENT prim. Agent must check the specific prim path, not just 'does this class exist anywhere?'.
code:
get_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube")
# -> empty / no class
# Correct reply: 'No — /World/Cube has no semantic label. Obstacle is on /World/Marker.'
failure_modes: 'The obstacle class is present' — confirms class existence without checking prim.
